resources.title: Wine Regions and Their Soil
resources.description: One of the most facinating aspects of wine. Its amazing how the same grape can turn out different depending on the soil compostion in the region its grown in. Here is a break down of famous regions and what makes them so unique!

resources.title: Wine Making Philosophy
resources.description: What is Natural, Organic, Biodynamic or just the conventional method? Here is a glimpse. Just know just because its conventional doesnt mean they are not practicing organic methods; particulalry now a days.

resources.title: Vintage  Guide
resources.description: This is always a tough one. Whats a great vintage? Someone winemakers can make a great wine in a poor vintage and some a poor wine in a great vintage. Use this as a general guide.
